title: DiscordSRVUtils
description: DiscordSRVUtils is a DiscordSRV addon to improve the abilities of DiscordSRV bot in your Discord server.
body: # 🌟 Elevate Your Server Experience with DiscordSRVUtils! Meet DiscordSRVUtils, the ultimate DiscordSRV Addon that transforms your Discord server ↔️ Minecraft Server connection into an epic adventure! From seamless plugin integration to mind-blowing systems, we've got it all! ## 🚀 Fully Custom Messages Say goodbye to boring messages! Want an embed? Don't want an embed? Customize every message in the plugin to match your server's personality! [![Explore Messages](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/messages) ![Custom Messages](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/custom-messages.png) ## ⚖️ Punishment Sync and Messages Keep justice alive! Sync punishments with your Discord (for linked players) and send custom messages that strike fear into the hearts of rule-breakers! [![Punishment Integration](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/punishments-integration) ![Punishment Sync](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/punishments-integration.png) ## 🎫 Tickets System Create a ticket panel where anyone can open a ticket hassle-free. 90% custom messages! [![Explore Tickets](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/tickets) ![Ticket System](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/tickets.png) ## 🌐 Leveling System Level up, sync up! Enjoy normal leveling synced with Discord for that extra boost of excitement! [![Leveling Fun](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/leveling) ![Leveling System](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/leveling.png) ## 💡 Suggestions System Unleash the power of unique suggestions! Your community, your rules! [![Innovative Suggestions](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/suggestions) ![Suggestions System](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/suggestions.png) ## 📊 Server Status System Keep everyone in the loop with a dedicated Server Status Channel! [![Server Status](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/status) ![Server Status](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/status.png) ## 📈 Invite Tracking System Curious about your community growth? Track invites, who invited whom, and whether they're still partying in the server or took off! [![Invite Tracking](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/generic_vector.svg)](https://wiki.discordsrvutils.xyz/invite-tracking) ![Invite Tracking](https://dsu.bluetree242.dev/img/features/invite-tracking.png) # 🚨 Disclaimer Just to be crystal clear, this plugin is not DiscordSRV itself; it's like the cool sidekick that uses DiscordSRV's API. Make sure you've got DiscordSRV installed for the magic to happen! ![Bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/DiscordSRVUtils.svg)
